---
name: RFC — propose a spec change
about: Required first step before any pull request that changes a specification
title: "RFC: "
labels: rfc
---

**Summary**

<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why. -->

**Motivation**

<!-- What problem exists today? Who hits it? -->

**Design**

<!-- The proposed change, precisely. Include example payloads where relevant. -->

**Compatibility**

<!-- Does this require a new spec version? What happens to existing events,
     manifests, and mirrors computed under the current version? -->

**Alternatives considered**
